title: Prohibit Adapter-Local Legacy Generator Logic
forbids: adapter-local ad-hoc RNG/fudge constructs and direct natural-wonder generator calls
why: The Civ7 adapter may wrap approved engine generator surfaces, but it should not grow product planning logic or unmodeled generator entrypoints.
remediate: Keep product planning logic in MapGen domains and route new engine-generator access through an explicit adapter method and reviewed Habitat rule update.
message: Civ7 adapter contains an unapproved RNG, fudge, or legacy generator construct.
